ideas.title: Replace 450GSM PES-PU Foam with 350GSM Alternative
ideas.raw_description: Reduce foam density in battery insulation cover from 450GSM to 350GSM PES-PU foam while maintaining thermal performance

ideas.title: Optimize Battery Mounting Technique
ideas.raw_description: Update battery mounting technique to align with KIA methodology, including redesign of battery-securing enclosure

ideas.title: Remove Paint Coating from Mounts and Brackets
ideas.raw_description: Eliminate paint coating process from non-visible mounting brackets and structural components

ideas.title: Substitute PC-ABS with Standard ABS
ideas.raw_description: Replace PC-ABS material with standard ABS in non-critical interior components where impact resistance is not required

ideas.title: Use Galvanized Steel for Window Regulators
ideas.raw_description: Switch from stainless steel to galvanized steel for window regulator mechanisms to reduce material cost

ideas.title: Optimize Seat Frame Welding Process
ideas.raw_description: Reduce number of weld points in seat frame assembly through design optimization and process improvement

ideas.title: Replace Leather with Synthetic Alternative
ideas.raw_description: Substitute genuine leather with high-quality synthetic leather in non-premium trim levels

ideas.title: Reduce Door Panel Thickness
ideas.raw_description: Optimize door panel material thickness from 3.5mm to 3.0mm through structural analysis and material property validation
